title: Hybrid PM2.5 Exposure Modeling & CAD Risk Prediction
description: Engineered a two-stage hybrid ML exposure model fusing satellite-derived AOD data with ground-level PM2.5 sensor readings, significantly outperforming single-source baselines. Implemented MixedLM to model random individual effects across 1,000+ participants, propagating outputs as engineered features into XGBoost models for measurable improvements in predictive R².

title: Heat Stress & Infant Growth — Longitudinal ML Study
description: Led end-to-end data science for a BMGF-funded multi-season observational cohort study. Developed and validated mixed-effects and exposure–response models to quantify heat stress impact on lactation and infant growth trajectories. Built supervised predictive models assessing omega-3 supplementation as a mitigation strategy.

title: NFHS RAG Research Assistant — GenAI Pipeline
description: Designed and deployed a production-style RAG pipeline using LlamaIndex to enable natural language querying of complex epidemiological datasets (100M+ data points). Engineered an intent-classification layer that dynamically adjusts retrieval depth, integrating BGE transformer embeddings with a persistent ChromaDB vector store for sub-second semantic search.

title: Credit Card Fraud Detection Pipeline
description: Anomaly detection system designed to identify fraudulent credit card transactions. Implemented comprehensive data preprocessing and handled extreme class imbalance using SMOTE and cost-sensitive learning techniques. Built an optimized XGBoost classification model to maximize precision and recall for rare fraudulent events.
